hooks.prompt: STOP. execute_blender_code is the FALLBACK. Check structured tools first: create_object, transform_object, manage_materials, manage_lights, set_camera, manage_world, mesh_operation, modify_object, build_node_graph, procedural_generate, manage_armature, set_keyframe, manage_physics, manage_collections, manage_hierarchy, render_scene, render_region, import_model, batch_execute.
